utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I am sure they will be here soon .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah , honey , they would not miss this .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Relax . You are only at nine centimeters . And the baby at zero station .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Somebody wanna help me , tryin to rip out my heart . Uh , that is great . Anybody seen a nipple ?

utterances.speaker: Dr. Franzblau
utterances.text: All right , ten centimeters , here we go .

utterances.speaker: Nurse
utterances.text: All right , honey , time to start pushing .

utterances.speaker: Carol
utterances.text: But they are not here yet !

utterances.speaker: Dr. Franzblau
utterances.text: I am sorry , I can not tell the baby to wait for them .
